title: Chugach Supports Strengthening 8(a) Contracting in NDAA
summary: The FY 2020 NDAA includes Section 823 (see below for details), which promotes the abilities of ANCs to continue to meet their Congressional mandate: operate as for-profit corporations that return monetary and non-monetary benefits to their Alaska Native shareholders. This provision would mitigate the damaging effects that Section 811 has had on the ability of Native contractors to compete with larger contractors on sole-source contracts with values in excess of $22 million (inflation adjusted from $20 mil...
